diagrams.title: Adjacency Matrix Structure
diagrams.description: Shows how directed edges map to matrix entries with rows as source vertices and columns as destination vertices
diagrams.purpose: Understanding matrix representation of graph connections

diagrams.title: Warshall's Algorithm Iterations
diagrams.description: Step-by-step visualization of how transitive closure builds paths through intermediate vertices k=1 to n
elements: Current R matrix at each step
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing dynamic programming approach for transitive closure

diagrams.title: Boolean Matrix Multiplication
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how row-column AND-OR operation finds paths of length 2
diagrams.purpose: Understanding Boolean operations for path counting

diagrams.title: Strong vs Weak Connectivity
diagrams.description: Comparison showing strongly connected (bidirectional paths) vs weakly connected (ignoring direction) digraphs
diagrams.purpose: Distinguishing connectivity types in directed graphs

diagrams.title: Incidence Matrix Layout
diagrams.description: Vertices as rows, edges as columns showing head (-1) and tail (+1) relationships
